title: A MESSAGE FROM THE ALASKA DEPTARTMENT OF PUBLIC SAFETY
summary: As the last of the summer salmon are running and hunting season gets into full swing, the Alaska State and Wildlife Troopers want to remind those spending time in the backcountry to be mindful of the property they are accessing. Alaska has private, public, federal, and Alaska native land allotments...
